task_completion.description: Verify that the specified currencies and pay frequencies have been added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'JPY', 'BRL', and 'INR' in the Currencies list, and 'Semi-Monthly' and 'Quarterly' in the Pay Frequencies list within Sentrifugo's configuration or payroll settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified prefixes have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Dr.', 'Sra.', and 'Sri' in the Prefixes configuration list or dropdowns.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new department and job titles have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'International Programs' in the Departments list, and 'Country Director' and 'Regional Coordinator' in the Job Titles list.

task_completion.description: Verify that employee Yuki Tanaka is registered with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an employee record for 'Yuki Tanaka' (EMP021) showing the department as 'International Programs' and job title as 'Country Director' in the employee list or profile view.

task_completion.description: Verify that employee Fernanda Costa is registered with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an employee record for 'Fernanda Costa' (EMP022) showing the department as 'International Programs' and job title as 'Regional Coordinator' in the employee list or profile view.

task_completion.description: Verify that employee Arjun Mehta is registered with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an employee record for 'Arjun Mehta' (EMP023) showing the department as 'International Programs' and job title as 'Country Director' in the employee list or profile view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to configure the settings and add employees.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo web application in a browser, not terminal windows executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the records were actually saved and are in an active state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The added configurations and employees should appear in the application's data grids, lists, or success confirmation screens, rather than just being typed into unsaved forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be visible within the Sentrifugo UI, not just in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Currencies: JPY, BRL, INR. Expected Pay Frequencies: Semi-Monthly, Quarterly. Expected Prefixes: Dr., Sra., Sri. Expected Department: International Programs. Expected Job Titles: Country Director, Regional Coordinator. Expected Employees: 1. Yuki Tanaka (EMP021, International Programs, Country Director), 2. Fernanda Costa (EMP022, International Programs, Regional Coordinator), 3. Arjun Mehta (EMP023, International Programs, Country Director). All entries must be saved and active.
